productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Four Strapped Red Sandal
description: Look all the more elegant with this stylish pair of slippers from carlton london. Designed to enhance your feminine side, this pair looks fabulous when teamed with jeans and an ethnic top, or simply stylish ethnic wear.Upper Strapped upper in the forefoot to lock the foot in place Ankle strap with two tang clasps for comfort Midsole PU midsole for durability and comfort Smooth and mildly cushioned footbed for protection Brick look outer midsole for style Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Horizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and stability High heel unit for style shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
